vllm.title: [Frontend] Add --logprobs argument to `benchmark_serving.py`
vllm.author: afeldman-nm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
(1) benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py now supports a --logprobs CLI argument, and (2) the value of the --logprobs CLI argument configures the underlying logprobs argument to the completion requests generated during benchmarking.
python benchmarks/benchmark_serving.py     --backend vllm      --model Ja

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Increasing timeout for multiproc worker tests
vllm.author: akondrat-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
On ROCm we have to use spawn instead of fork and it creates an overhead, so five seconds might not be enough to create and destroy eight worker processes.
Please note, increasing the timeout to 60 seconds will not impact the test execution time unless there is a problem.
FIX #xxxx (link existing iss

vllm.title: [Kernel] [Triton] Memory optimization for awq_gemm and awq_dequantize, 2x throughput
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This optimization reduces the number of loads from memory that the awq_gemm and awq_dequantize need to do, resulting in 2x throughput from previous implementation. The following benchmark is attached:
python benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py --input-len 2048 --output-len 128 --quantization awq --mo

vllm.title: [Model] Allow loading from original Mistral format
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Mistral models are usually uploaded in two formats:


The original consolidated format:
consolidated.safetensors
params.json


A bit later the HF format is usually also uploaded:
model-00001-of-00003.safetensors
config.json


This PR allows to load directly from the original consolidated format whic

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Hermes tool call chat template bug
vllm.author: K-Mistele
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The Hermes tool calling chat template had a bug where a curly brace } was placed after the function's name , rather than after the arguments. This was not caught due to low-temperature tests, but results in inconsistent results at higher temperatures.
cc @mgoin @interstellarninja
BEFORE SUBMITTING,

vllm.title: [Model] Multi-input support for LLaVA and fix embedding inputs for multi-image models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR extends the vLLM support for multi-image input from LLaVA-NeXT to LLaVA. Note that LLaVA from the original authors hasn't been trained on multi-image inputs, so this is mostly useful for custom trained models.
I also found and fixed a hidden bug where embeddings cannot be inputted for models

vllm.title: Enable Random Prefix Caching in Serving Profiling Tool (benchmark_serving.py)
vllm.author: wschin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Prefix-caching is an important feature but not supported in vllm's serving profiler. This PR extends random data generator in benchmark_serving.py to create requests with fixed prefix context. The newly added --random-prefix-len specifies the prefix in every random request; the total context length
